purpose: Minimal Codex skill subset to carry to the H200 host for the P0 TabPFN view-router branch.
operational_reflections: Use h200-gpu-ops first. The practical P0 pattern is 4 GPUs per run in per_view mode, then two concurrent seeds to occupy all 8 H200s.
Use experiment-design-tracker to freeze dataset_source=openml, openml_dataset_id=44024, split_seed=42, and the GPU group layout for multiseed reruns.
Use git-codebase-ops before and after long H200 runs so result directories stay separate from code edits.
Keep gemini-validator-reconciler optional until Gemini CLI and auth are actually present on the host.

workflows.name: bringup
workflows.goal: Validate CUDA, repo state, and host readiness before first P0 run.

workflows.name: p0_multiseed_openml
workflows.goal: Run OpenML California multiseed P0 sweeps with fixed split_seed=42 and stable GPU groups.

workflows.name: postrun_review
workflows.goal: Snapshot diffs, summarize outputs, and optionally cross-check code or report drift.

skills.name: h200-gpu-ops
skills.why: GPU runtime bring-up, guardrails, and H200 validation.

skills.name: git-codebase-ops
skills.why: Safe git branch, diff, and commit-readiness checks on the GPU host.

skills.name: git-tree-manager
skills.why: Quick repo structure and impact mapping when working from a new host.

skills.name: experiment-design-tracker
skills.why: Freeze seed contracts, runtime settings, and result lineage for H200 reruns.

skills.name: results-manager
skills.why: Keep multi-seed P0 reports organized and reproducible.

skills.name: gemini-validator-reconciler
skills.why: Second-pass code and report validation after branch-local edits.
